ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Alabama, Alaska) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the location */,
  "health_authority" TEXT /* Name of the health authority responsible for the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., YYG-ParamSearch, LANL-GrowthRate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer or organization that created the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Bayesian, deterministic) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "documentation_link" TEXT /* Link to the model's documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Predicted value (e.g., infection rate) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value (if available) */,
  "actual_date" TEXT /* Date the actual value was recorded */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction (e.g., ensemble, single model) */,
  "prediction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the prediction */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Mean Absolute Error, Root Mean Squared Error) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_metrics_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the prediction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., released, beta, deprecated) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "version_files_link" TEXT /* Link to the version files */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "param_range" TEXT /* Range of the parameter value */,
  "param_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter (e.g., empirical data, theoretical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, hold-out) */,
  "evaluation_result" TEXT /* Result of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the evaluation (e.g., cross-validation, hold-out) */,
  "evaluation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of the publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper) */,
  "publication_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_citations" INTEGER /* Number of citations the publication has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_publications_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pref_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., preferred_model, notification_settings) */,
  "pref_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "pref_category" TEXT /* Category of the preference (e.g., display, notification) */,
  "pref_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the preference (e.g., global, specific model) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, researcher, data analyst) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the role assignment */,
  "assignment_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
